metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Technology Explorations 10 is a flexible course that allows students to explore emerging and specialized technologies that don't fit neatly into other courses. Students investigate cutting-edge fields such as biotechnology, nanotechnology, 3D printing, artificial intelligence, renewable energy innovations, and other rapidly evolving technologies. Through research, experimentation, and projects, they prepare for a technology-driven future.
metadata.general_description: Elective course focused on emerging and specialized technologies, innovation, and future applications.

big_ideas.statement: New technologies emerge continuously, and the ability to learn, adapt, and critically evaluate is more important than knowing specific technologies.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students develop mindsets and skills for engaging with technology throughout their lives. They learn that technological literacy means staying curious and learning how to learn new tools and concepts.

big_ideas.statement: Emerging technologies promise solutions to major challenges but also raise new questions and potential problems.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students explore real-world emerging technologies, understanding both their potential benefits and their risks or unintended consequences. Critical thinking is essential.

big_ideas.statement: Innovation requires combining technical knowledge, creativity, and understanding of human needs.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students learn that breakthrough technologies often come from asking new questions or combining existing ideas in novel ways. They explore the innovation process.

big_ideas.statement: Technology careers and opportunities are diverse and evolving, offering pathways for many types of people and interests.
big_ideas.elaboration: By exploring various technologies, students discover potential career paths and understand that technology fields need diverse perspectives and talents.

competencies.raw: Identify problems that emerging technologies could solve
i_can_statements: I can identify real problems in the world
I can research how technology could address challenges
I can evaluate whether technology is the right solution
I can consider unintended consequences of solutions
I can design projects using emerging technologies
I can adapt technologies for specific uses
I can prototype and test designs
I can refine designs based on results
I can research and analyze new technologies
I can evaluate benefits, risks, and trade-offs
I can consider environmental and social impacts
I can make informed recommendations
I can explain emerging technologies clearly
I can present technology research effectively
I can engage others in thinking about technology futures
I can advocate for responsible technology development

competencies.raw: Learn and apply new technologies quickly
i_can_statements: I can learn new tools and technologies independently
I can read documentation and instructions
I can troubleshoot when learning something new
I can become competent with new technology
I can research emerging technologies systematically
I can find and evaluate reliable sources
I can experiment with technologies
I can document findings and results
I can work on teams developing technology solutions
I can contribute diverse perspectives
I can manage group projects
I can present group work
I can explore career pathways in technology
I can understand education and training requirements
I can develop relevant skills and knowledge
I can pursue opportunities in technology fields
I can understand 3D printing technologies and processes
I can design objects for 3D printing
I can use 3D printers and equipment
I can evaluate applications and limitations

competencies.raw: Explore biotechnology and life sciences applications
i_can_statements: I can understand biotechnology applications
I can conduct basic life sciences experiments
I can understand genetic engineering basics
I can evaluate benefits and ethics

competencies.raw: Explore artificial intelligence and machine learning
i_can_statements: I can understand AI and machine learning basics
I can work with ML models and tools
I can explore AI applications
I can consider AI ethics and bias
I can explore nanotechnology applications
I can understand blockchain and distributed technologies
I can explore quantum computing concepts
I can stay current with emerging technology trends

areas.name: Emerging and Specialized Technologies
topics: Futures thinking and emerging technology trends
